top_features.label: contains playful, imaginative, or surreal descriptions involving fantasy elements or unusual scenarios
mentions the term 'AI' explicitly in the text
contains discussions or requests specifically about image generation or manipulation
contains references to or excerpts from AI jailbreaks, model alignment critiques, or discussions about AI system limitations and internal behaviors
contains explicit references to 'prompts' or 'prompt engineering' and discussions on how to write, improve, or manage prompts
mentions Sam Altman and his firing or removal from OpenAI
contains detailed descriptions of self-built AI tools, apps, or software projects aimed at solving specific problems or automating tasks
contains requests to create or generate images based on personal personality traits or characteristics
contains discussions about job loss or job risk due to AI and its economic or societal impact
